case_title: SASIKIRAN MYADAM VS. ROY CHOY LEE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SASIKARIN MYADAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROY CHOY LEE IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY DAUGHTER MELLISSA LEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MYADAM, SASIKIRAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEE, ROY CHOY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS PASSED-CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT LISTED) SERVED FEB-27-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, ROY CHOY

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: NO ANSWER.ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS PROVIDED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MYADAM, SASIKIRAN AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, ROY CHOY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,180.00 FILED BY MYADAM, SASIKIRAN AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, ROY CHOY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
